name: (c) h2h NET — the open book / Kyle case. Stakeholder != subject; non-playing backer Kyle collects from Steven.
_contract: Golden HAND-CALC fixture for the NEW bets engine (engine/bets/). Proves subjects-are-distinct-from-stakeholders (FR8/FR10): the SettlementEdge is between STAKEHOLDERS (Kyle, Steven), NOT subjects (Josh, Madden). Kyle is not in the playing field yet still appears in settle-up (FR38). Engine CONSUMES net-per-hole as a GIVEN input (P2). `expected` is hand-calculated truth. Edge direction: fromPlayerId PAYS toPlayerId. Cents.
_handCalc: Josh net total = 36 (front, all 4s) + 36 (back, all 4s) = 72. Madden net total = 37 (front: one 5 on hole 5) + 37 (back: one 5 on hole 16) = 74. Lower wins: 72 < 74, subject A (Josh) wins by 2. The money is between the STAKEHOLDERS, not the subjects: side A's stakeholder is Kyle (a roster member NOT playing this round), side B's is Steven. Loser's stakeholder Steven pays winner's stakeholder Kyle $10.00 = 1000c. Edge: steven -> kyle, 1000c. Kyle never teed off but appears in settle-up (FR38). This is the core open-book proof.
